## Severity

- [ ] **Critical** — System crash / bricked / data loss
- [ ] **High** — Major feature broken, no workaround
- [ ] **Medium** — Feature broken but workaround exists
- [ ] **Low** — Minor issue, cosmetic, or edge case

## Component

- [ ] MCU Firmware (`app_example/`)
- [ ] LCD Driver (`app_example/drv/lcd/`)
- [ ] UI / LVGL
- [ ] WiFi / MQTT
- [ ] PC Collector (`PC/`)
- [ ] CI / Build
- [ ] Other:
